title: Emberlight Horror
description: A fairly simple horror modpack that has a vanilla+ style to it so it's not constant screaming.
body:
I had a lot of fun creating Emberlight Survival, my fabric survival+ modpack. SOOO, I decided to go ahead and make a nice little horror modpack. The goal was to have a mix of survival+ and horror, so let me know how you feel about it and if you run into any bugs.

I'd like to point out now that I didn't make any of these mods, resource packs, or shaders.

Feel free to join our discord server for community updates and support!: [Emberlight HQ Discord](https://discord.gg/hbADMYHMSU)
